scripts.web:dev: concurrently -n "SOCKET,WEB" -c "red,blue" "npm run dev -w packages/socket" "npm run dev -w packages/web"
scripts.start: concurrently -n "SOCKET,WEB,ELECTRON,APPDIR,EXAMPLES" -c "red,blue,green,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev -w packages/socket" "npm run dev -w packages/web" "npm run dev -w packages/app-directory" "npm run dev -w packages/example-apps" "wait-on -l -i 1000 -t 60000 -w 1000 tcp:localhost:5173 && npm run electron:start"
